special_mechanics.name: Yoshi Companion
special_mechanics.description: Player can summon Yoshi to Luigi's location; Yoshi used to eat Pokey enemies blocking level exits

tier_notes: Tier 3: Educational platformer with minimal physics documentation. Sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and development history. No technical movement parameters, gravity values, or physics constants documented. Game focused on educational content (geography, landmarks) rather than platformer mechanics precision.
sources_used: tcrf - Mario is Missing! (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor
